Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5900 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Starglider.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $05d0 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0410 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Starglider.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0410 which: 1. Displays the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game 2. Sets the CIA #1 timer B ($DC06/$DC07) to $040A so that the music/sound begins as soon as the game starts just like the disk version
